workflows.name: Newsletter Subscriber Notification
workflows.description: Handles new newsletter signups and sends notifications to team

config.code: const data = $json; return { email: data.email, source: data.source, signup_date: data.signup_date, utm_data: data.utm_data, lead_score: calculateLeadScore(data.source), priority: data.source === 'referral' ? 'high' : 'normal' };

workflows.name: Operational Waste Audit Request Handler
workflows.description: Processes audit requests and routes to appropriate team members

config.code: const data = $json; let priority = 'medium'; if (data.business_type?.includes('property management')) priority = 'high'; if (data.estimated_value > 4000) priority = 'high'; if (data.source === 'referral') priority = 'high'; return { ...data, calculated_priority: priority };

config.subject: New Audit Request - {{$json.company_name}}

workflows.name: Weekly Newsletter Report Generator
workflows.description: Generates and distributes weekly performance reports

config.code: const data = $json; return { week_start: data.week_start, week_end: data.week_end, total_subscribers: data.total_subscribers, new_subscribers: data.new_subscribers, growth_rate: data.growth_rate, avg_open_rate: data.avg_open_rate, audit_requests: data.audit_requests, revenue_generated: data.revenue_generated };

workflows.name: Platform Improvement Signal Capture
workflows.description: Captures and processes platform improvement signals from various sources

config.code: const signal = $json; let urgency = 'medium'; let revenue_impact = 0; if (signal.description.toLowerCase().includes('revenue') || signal.description.toLowerCase().includes('lose') || signal.description.toLowerCase().includes('cost')) { urgency = 'high'; revenue_impact = 5000; } if (signal.source === 'audit_call' || signal.source === 'customer_complaint') { urgency = 'high'; } return { ...signal, calculated_urgency: urgency, estimated_revenue_impact: revenue_impact };

workflows.name: Beehiiv Sync Handler
workflows.description: Syncs subscriber data between Beehiiv and Supabase

workflows.name: Hermes Controlled Gmail Reply Lookup
workflows.description: Phase 3 repair: autonomous reply ingestion uses the approved n8n Gmail credential/runtime instead of an out-of-band connector.

config.code: const data = $json || {}; const threadId = String(data.thread_id || data.threadId || data.provider_thread_id || '').trim(); const messageId = String(data.message_id || data.provider_message_id || data.gmail_message_id || data.in_reply_to || '').trim(); const from = String(data.from || data.reply_from || data.controlled_from || '').trim().toLowerCase(); const newerThan = String(data.newer_than || '365d').trim(); const queryParts = ['in:anywhere', `newer_than:${newerThan}`]; if (from) queryParts.push(`from:${from}`); const query = queryParts.join(' '); return { ...data, thread_id: threadId, message_id: messageId, gmail_query: query, lookup_status: query ? 'ready' : 'missing_query' };

const request = $('Build Gmail Query').first().json || {}; const items = $input.all().map(i => i.json).filter(Boolean); const headersFor = (m) => Array.isArray(m.payload?.headers) ? m.payload.headers : []; const header = (m, name) => (headersFor(m).find(h => String(h.name).toLowerCase() === name.toLowerCase()) || {}).value || ''; const matchesMessage = (m) => request.message_id && (String(m.id || m.message_id || '') === request.message_id || String(header(m, 'Message-ID')).includes(request.message_id)); const matchesThread = (m) => request.thread_id && String(m.threadId || m.thread_id || '') === request.thread_id; const matchesFrom = (m) => request.from && String(header(m, 'From') || m.from || '').toLowerCase().includes(request.from); const reply = items.find(m => matchesMessage(m) || matchesThread(m) || (!request.message_id && !request.thread_id && matchesFrom(m))); if (!reply) return { status: 'not_found', reply_found: false, query: request.gmail_query, thread_id: request.thread_id, message_id: request.message_id, lookup_checked_at: new Date().toISOString() }; return { status: 'found', reply_found: true, message_id: reply.id || reply.message_id, provider_event_id: reply.id || reply.message_id, thread_id: reply.threadId || reply.thread_id, from: header(reply, 'From') || reply.from || '', subject: header(reply, 'Subject') || reply.subject || '', date: header(reply, 'Date') || reply.date || reply.internalDate || '', body_preview: reply.snippet || reply.body_preview || '', query: request.gmail_query, lookup_checked_at: new Date().toISOString() };

environment_variables.HUBSPOT_API_KEY: HubSpot API key for CRM integration
environment_variables.HERMES_EMAIL_CONTROLLED_RECIPIENT: Jonathan-controlled Gmail recipient for Phase 2 reply acceptance

setup_instructions.1: Import each workflow into your n8n instance
setup_instructions.2: Configure environment variables in n8n settings
setup_instructions.3: Test each webhook endpoint with sample data
setup_instructions.4: Enable scheduled workflows for automated reporting
setup_instructions.6: Adjust notification settings based on team preferences
